description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof and a combination of brick and siding exterior finishes. The front facade includes a covered porch area, flanked by two large windows and a central entrance, while the driveway leads to an attached garage on one side. The landscaping includes a small lawn, several trees, and a paved walkway connecting the street to the entrance. The roof is dark gray, contrasting with the warm brown and white tones of the walls. The rear and side elevations show fewer windows, with the back wall being mostly solid except for a small window. The overall design is compact, with a focus on functional living space and curb appeal.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, brick and siding exterior, attached garage, and a covered front porch surrounded by a small lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, two large windows, and attached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and partial view of the porch and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid brick wall with minimal windows and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, main entrance, and driveway extending to the street.
